headline: Eli Lilly Recall Push On Compounded Zepbound And Investor Risk Questions
summary: Eli Lilly has urged the FDA to recall compounded versions of its obesity drug Zepbound (tirzepatide), citing impurity and safety concerns. The company reports findings of impurities, bacterial contamination, and chemical byproducts in some compounded tirzepatide products. Lilly is asking regulators to act against unauthorized compounders that add ingredients such as vitamin B12 to tirzepatide. The move raises questions about patient safety, regulatory oversight, and the role of compounded...

headline: Eli Lilly Could Rejoin Abivax Bidding If AstraZeneca Misses Deadline
summary: British drugmaker AstraZeneca Plc has emerged as the leading contender to acquire French biotech Abivax SA, following the company's dramatic valuation surge after strong clinical progress tied to its lead drug candidate. The potential takeover comes as major pharmaceutical companies hunt for innovative therapies to replenish their pipelines. Abivax drew attention after its shares soared roughly 1,600% in 2025 to reach a market value of about 7.7 billion euros (around $8.9 billion). Don't Miss: F
